purpose: Baseline execution discipline for any assigned task, regardless of domain: read the full task spec before acting, stay inside the declared scope, and verify before reporting completion.
useWhen: Every task assigned to a worker agent, in addition to any domain/technical/project skill it also requires
dontUseWhen: Never skip this skill — it is the baseline every task requires
procedure: Read the full task goal and every acceptance criterion before making any change
Stay strictly inside task.affectedPaths; never touch a file outside that scope
Make the smallest change that satisfies the acceptance criteria
Run every command in task.verificationCommands and record the real output
Only call submit_result once verification has actually been run, not assumed
verificationSteps: Every command in task.verificationCommands was actually executed via run_command
verification.passed in the submitted task-result reflects the real command exit codes, not an assumption
doneWhen: All acceptance criteria are satisfied and verification.passed is true
submit_result has been called with a schema-valid task-result document
escalateWhen: The task cannot be completed within the declared affectedPaths
A required verification command fails after a reasonable fix attempt
The task goal is ambiguous or contradicts the acceptance criteria
